name: Mechanical Gaming Mouse
alt: Black RGB mechanical gaming mouse on a dark mousepad
description: High-precision gaming mouse with 16000 DPI optical sensor, 7 programmable buttons, RGB lighting, and ergonomic grip design.

name: Curved Gaming Monitor 27"
alt: Curved gaming monitor with RGB lighting on a gaming desk setup
description: 27-inch 1440p curved VA display with 165Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, AMD FreeSync, and adjustable stand.

name: Running Sneakers
alt: Bright red and white running sneakers on a clean background
description: Lightweight and responsive running shoes with breathable mesh upper and cushioned sole for all-day comfort.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
alt: Compact cylindrical Bluetooth speaker on a wooden surface
description: Compact waterproof speaker with 360° surround sound, 12-hour playtime, and seamless Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity.

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
alt: Brown leather crossbody bag with gold buckle detail
description: Stylish and durable crossbody bag with multiple compartments, adjustable strap, and premium PU leather finish.

name: Logitech G Pro Mouse
alt: Small lightweight high-end white gaming mouse on a dark mousepad
description: Ultra-lightweight 61g wireless gaming mouse with HERO 25K sensor, up to 70-hour battery, zero-additive PTFE feet, and pro-grade precision.

name: Wireless Keyboard
alt: Flat wireless keyboard with white switches on a desk
description: Compact TKL Flat wireless keyboard with premium surface, tactile white switches, and plug-and-play USB-C connection.

name: Polarized Sunglasses
alt: Stylish polarized sunglasses with dark lenses on a white surface
description: UV400 polarized lenses with lightweight acetate frames. Reduces glare and provides full eye protection in style.

name: Scented Soy Candle Set
alt: Three scented soy candles in glass jars arranged together
description: Set of 3 hand-poured soy wax candles in calming lavender, vanilla bean, and sandalwood scents. Up to 40 hours burn time each.

name: Xiaomi Pad 6
alt: Xiaomi Pad 6 tablet with slim bezels on a clean surface
description: 11-inch 2.8K 144Hz display, Snapdragon 870 processor, 8GB RAM, 128GB storage, quad speakers with Dolby Atmos, and 8840mAh battery.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Set
alt: Ceramic pour-over coffee dripper placed on top of a white mug
description: Handcrafted ceramic pour-over dripper with a matching mug and reusable stainless steel filter. Perfect for coffee enthusiasts.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker Band
alt: Black smart fitness tracker band displaying heart rate on wrist
description: Tracks steps, heart rate, sleep, and calories. Features a vibrant AMOLED display, 7-day battery, and swim-proof design.

name: Wooden Desk Organizer
alt: Bamboo desk organizer with multiple compartments holding stationery
description: Minimalist bamboo desk organizer with 5 compartments for pens, phones, notebooks, and office supplies. Natural finish.

name: Instant Film Camera
alt: Retro white instant film camera with a colorful stripe detail
description: Retro-style instant camera that prints credit-card sized photos in seconds. Lightweight, fun, and perfect for gifting.

name: Plant-Based Protein Powder
alt: Chocolate plant-based protein powder in a scoop on a dark surface
description: 25g of clean pea & brown rice protein per serving. Chocolate flavor, no artificial sweeteners, gluten-free and vegan.

name: Linen Throw Blanket
alt: Soft oatmeal linen throw blanket draped over a couch armrest
description: Soft, breathable 100% washed linen throw in a neutral oatmeal tone. Lightweight for year-round use on the couch or bed.

name: Stainless Steel Cookware Set
alt: Shiny stainless steel pots and pans set arranged on a kitchen counter
description: 5-piece tri-ply stainless steel cookware set including fry pan, saucepan, and stockpot. Oven-safe up to 500°F, dishwasher-safe.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
alt: Slim round wireless charging pad with a smartphone placed on top
description: Slim 15W fast wireless charger compatible with all Qi-enabled devices. Anti-slip base, LED indicator, and USB-C powered.
